notes: Kenyan utility bill breakdown showing various regulatory charges including FCC (fuel cost charge), FERFA (Foreign Exchange Rate Fluctuation Adjustment), IA (inflation adjustment), WARMA (Water Resources Management Authority), ERC (Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority), and REP (Rural Electrification Programme). VAT is shown separately at bottom but excluded from MRP calculation.
